message:
fix(core): use max when syncing last_local_commit_seq to pager floor

sync_filebacked_post_commit_visibility_floor unconditionally overwrote
last_local_commit_seq with the pager's visible_commit_seq, which could
decrease it if the pager's seq was lower than the connection's own
commit seq. This would cause emit_differential_commit_invalidations
to use a stale seq, potentially missing subscriber notifications.

Use max() to ensure last_local_commit_seq only advances, never retreats.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
